overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through an industrial urban district during golden hour. The player moves from an open intersection toward a massive megabuilding, then along sidewalks beneath elevated highway structures, passing graffiti-covered walls and industrial piping before turning a corner near pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial intersection with overhead pipe bridges

events.description: crossing the asphalt road from open intersection toward the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide industrial intersection toward the massive megabuilding with the sun setting behind it

entered.detail: massive futuristic skyscraper with industrial architecture silhouetted against the setting sun
network of large metal pipes and walkways spanning across the street overhead
single palm tree visible against the blue sky near industrial containers
tall modern street lamp with rectangular light fixture

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide industrial intersection with clear golden hour lighting. The camera moves forward across asphalt toward a massive megabuilding in the distance, passing beneath overhead industrial pipe bridges. A palm tree stands to the left near teal-colored industrial containers as the player approaches the far sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway and industrial pipes

events.description: moving from open intersection onto sidewalk beneath elevated industrial structures

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk beneath the shadow of elevated highway structures

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel elevated highway casting shadows over the sidewalk
dark wall covered with white and blue graffiti tags and street art
low industrial building with metal roll-up shutters and ventilation grates

segments.scene_description: The player moves onto a narrow sidewalk sheltered beneath massive elevated highway structures. The environment becomes more enclosed with graffiti-covered industrial walls on the left and overhead concrete platforms filtering the golden sunlight. The megabuilding remains visible ahead through the industrial framework as the player passes scattered trash and debris along the concrete path.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner approach with pedestrian crossing

events.description: pedestrians become visible ahead near the street corner

agents.ego_description: approaching the street corner where several pedestrians are gathered near the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking along the sidewalk and waiting near the corner

entered.detail: piles of garbage bags and scattered cardboard on the sidewalk near the corner

segments.scene_description: As the player approaches the street corner, the environment opens slightly revealing pedestrians ahead. The sidewalk is littered with trash and debris. The elevated highway structure now dominates the right side of the frame while the megabuilding remains visible straight ahead. The player continues toward the intersection where NPCs are visible waiting near the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with floating platform structure

events.description: turning right at the street corner onto the crosswalk
passing extremely close to an NPC worker in a safety vest

agents.ego_description: turning the corner and passing within close proximity to a worker wearing a safety vest and headphones

notable_agents.action: worker in yellow safety vest and headphones standing at the crosswalk corner

entered.detail: massive floating industrial platform suspended above the street with complex scaffolding and structures underneath
zebra crossing markings on the asphalt street

segments.scene_description: The player turns right at the corner, passing extremely close to an NPC worker in a safety vest. The view opens to reveal a massive floating industrial platform structure suspended over the street ahead. The megabuilding is now visible to the left while the player looks down a new street lined with industrial buildings and overhead scaffolding. The crosswalk markings are visible on the asphalt as the player completes the turn.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a wide industrial intersection into the enclosed shadows of an urban underpass, eventually opening onto a new street. It begins by moving across open asphalt toward a distant megabuilding, passing beneath industrial pipe bridges and beside teal containers under a golden hour sky. As the camera reaches the sidewalk, the environment becomes more confined beneath massive elevated highway structures, where filtered sunlight hits graffiti-covered walls and scattered debris. The scene then opens slightly as the camera approaches a street corner populated by pedestrians, with the highway structure dominating the right side of the frame. Finally, the camera turns right, passing close to a worker in a safety vest to reveal a massive floating industrial platform suspended over a new street lined with scaffolding.
